title: Animal Facts
description: Adds commands to get random facts about the animal provided.
body:
Simple Spigot Plugin which adds commands to get random facts about that animal! ## Commands **/catfact:** Get a random cat fact. Uses the [MeowFacts API](https://github.com/wh-iterabb-it/meowfacts).
**/dogfact:** Get a random dog fact. Uses the [Dog API](https://dogapi.dog/)
